svg.style: background: transparent; background-color: transparent; color-scheme: light dark;
svg.content:
<mxfile host="Electron"> <diagram name="Flyway 三道防线" id="flyway-guards"> <mxGraphModel dx="-514" dy="-114" grid="0" gridSize="10" guides="1" tooltips="1" connect="1" arrows="1" fold="0" page="0" pageScale="1" pageWidth="980" pageHeight="360" math="0" shadow="0"> <root> <mxCell id="0" /> <mxCell id="1" parent="0" /> <mxCell id="GRP" parent="1" style="rounded=0;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#f8fafc;strokeColor=#cbd5e1;verticalAlign=top;fontStyle=1;fontSize=13;fontColor=#1e293b;spacingTop=6;" value="Flyway 版本号三道防线:构建期硬校验 + 时间戳唯一 + 启动期 gap 检测" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="290" width="920" x="30" y="30" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="DEV" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffffff;strokeColor=#2563eb;fontColor=#1e293b;fontSize=12;" value="开发者 / AI
创建迁移" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="50" width="130" x="60" y="140" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="C1" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffffff;strokeColor=#dc2626;fontColor=#1e293b;fontSize=11;" value="防线 1
verify_flyway_migration_versions.py
mvn validate 阶段执行
重复 → 构建失败" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="80" width="220" x="250" y="100" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="C2" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffffff;strokeColor=#2563eb;fontColor=#1e293b;fontSize=11;" value="防线 2
秒级时间戳
V20260614141405__
天然全局唯一" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="80" width="180" x="520" y="100" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="C3" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffffff;strokeColor=#d4a017;fontColor=#1e293b;fontSize=11;" value="防线 3
启动期 gap 校验
+ 自动 repair
失败可配不阻断启动" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="80" width="170" x="750" y="100" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="FAIL" parent="1" style="text;html=1;align=center;fontColor=#dc2626;fontSize=11;fontStyle=1;" value="❌ 本地构建就挂
CI 拦下" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="36" width="160" x="280" y="210" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="E1" edge="1" parent="1" source="DEV" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;html=1;endArrow=classic;strokeColor=#2563eb;fontColor=#64748b;fontSize=10;" target="C1" value="防线1 校验"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="E2" edge="1" parent="1" source="C1" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;html=1;endArrow=classic;strokeColor=#2563eb;fontColor=#64748b;fontSize=10;" target="C2" value="通过"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="E3" edge="1" parent="1" source="C2" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;html=1;endArrow=classic;strokeColor=#2563eb;fontColor=#64748b;fontSize=10;" target="C3" value="提交"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="E4" edge="1" parent="1" source="C1" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;html=1;endArrow=classic;strokeColor=#dc2626;fontColor=#64748b;fontSize=10;" target="FAIL" value="重复"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> </root> </mxGraphModel> </diagram> </mxfile>
